Amintik 200
Nutritive Infusion of Pure Crystalline Amino Acids 7% (200ml GLASS BOTTLE)
Important for  the maintenance of body homeostasis and metabolism in critically
ill patients¹
Improves nitrogen balance, reduces furosemide requirements and ameliorates
water balance in acute renal failure patients with conserved diuresis²
Stimulates whole-body protein accretion during the initial week following ICU
admission in critically ill patients3
Used to treat malnutrition and prevent postoperative starvation
FOR PARENTERAL NUTRITION WHEN:
ORAL OR ENTERAL NUTRITION IS NOT POSSIBLE, INSUFFICIENT
OR CONTRAINDICATED
GASTROINTESTINAL ABSORPTION IS IMPAIRED BY OBSTRUCTION,
INFLAMMATORY DISEASE OR ANTINEOPLASTIC THERAPY
BOWEL REST IS NEEDED BECAUSE OF GASTROINTESTINAL SURGERY
TO TREAT NEGATIVE NITROGEN BALANCE
